title: 08128_PrE-Text_Training_Language_Models_on_Private_Federated_Data_in_the_Age_of_LLMs
negative_examples: PrE-Text does not provide privacy guarantees for the public data that was used to train these models.
The training data may not have been intended for use in language models, raising ethical questions.
It is important to ensure that the public data used to pretrain the base models has been properly audited.
